title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Announcements
text:
| The Counting of Votes in connection with the General TTAADC Election, 2026 shall take place on 17th April, 2026 from 8.00 AM onwards under West Tripura District. | 16/04/2026 | 18/04/2026 | |
| The General Election to TTAADC, 2026 is scheduled to be held in the West Tripura District on 12th April, 2026 and maintenance of peace and tranquility is considered absolutely essential for holding of free and fair election. | ORDER WHEREAS, the General Election to TTAADC, 2026 is scheduled to be held in the West Tripura District on 12th April, 2026 and maintenance of peace and tranquility is considered absolutely essential for holding of free and fair election. | 09/04/2026 | 13/04/2026 | |
content:
